race.comment: SUPER SUNNY SEEYA (2) was well in the market but disappointed backers last time when finishing sixth here. Earlier form this prep reads well in this line-up, so last run worth forgiving. MY TRUTH (10) finished third when resuming from a spell last start over 1200m at Narrandera. Strips fitter on the quick turnaround and is drawn to get all the favours from the inside pillar. Bold showing anticipated. EMMOOKI MAGIC (13) has struggled to threaten of late against tougher opposition, so will appreciate dropping down a couple rungs. Draws the carpark but gets in light with the 3kg claim. In the mix. BENTLEY BROOK (1) resumes and looks best of the rest in his stable debut.
